name: Hotel Transylvania
description:
Join our monster friends in Hotel Transylvania! In this one it is a demon pov but feel free to change it whatever you like! Explore, have adventures with Hank, Mavis, Wendy, and Pedro!

Also side note this show in my opinion is SO UNDERRATED it is so good and comedic i highy recommend it :3 as always please enjoy and leave a review if something is off

Thank you for using the bot! ❤️❤️❤️
